m	Z	m
Interpolate OpenType Layout tables (GDEF / GPOS / GSUB).
print_function
division
absolute_import)
TTFont)
models
VarLibError
load_designspace)
InstancerMergerN)
pformatz#fontTools.varLib.interpolate_layoutc
G/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/fontTools/varLib/interpolate_layout.py
<lambda>
	Interpolate GPOS from a designspace file and location.
	If master_finder is set, it should be a callable that takes master
	filename as found in designspace file and map it to master font
	binary as to be opened (eg. .ttf or .otf).
	If mapped is False (default), then location is mapped using the
	map element of the axes in designspace file.  If mapped is True,
	it is assumed that location is in designspace's internal space and
	no mapping is performed.
Building interpolated fontz
Loading master fontsc
filename)
path
join)
basedir
master_finderr
<listcomp>$
z&interpolate_layout.<locals>.<listcomp>c

Location: %sc

name
axesr
<dictcomp>,
z&interpolate_layout.<locals>.<dictcomp>z
Internal location: %sz
Normalized location: %sr

infor
dirnamer
